name: connectivityAnalysis
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.significantConnections.every(c => typeof c.from === 'string' && typeof c.to === 'string' && Number.isFinite(c.correlation) && Math.abs(c.correlation) <= 1.0001)
_note: Pure compute, reads artifact.data. Pearson cross-correlation per channel pair + cross-correlation peak-lag directionality + hub detection. THE DEAD-SURFACE FIX: NeuroActionPanel rendered r.result.connections, which the handler never returns — the real field is significantConnections[] (fixed 2026-06-28: card + DM body + agent task + render all read significantConnections, and the density footer reads networkMetrics.density). correlationMatrix is { labels, matrix }, not a bare number[][]. Needs ≥2 channels (validation-rejection).
